explanation: I entered the seeded OrangeHRM admin username.
I entered the seeded OrangeHRM admin password.
I signed in and returned directly to the Apply Leave page.
I opened the leave-type chooser so I can prepare the seeded annual leave request.
I selected the seeded Annual Leave type for this one-day request.
I entered the leave start date.
I entered the leave comment and left the request ready for confirmation.

action.question: I have prepared a one-day Annual Leave request for 2026-06-15. Do you want me to apply it?

explanation: Applying this form would submit a real leave request in the self-hosted enterprise system, so I am asking for confirmation before submitting it.
